Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests.datatype

package org.eventb.core.ast.tests.datatype
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.eventb.core.ast.tests
     
    org.eventb.core.ast.tests.extension
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    TestConstructor
    Unit tests of interfaces IConstructorExtension and IConstructorArgument.
    TestConstructorBuilder
    Unit tests of interface IConstructorBuilder.
    TestDatatypeParser
    Acceptance tests for the specific type parser used when building datatype.
    TestDatatypeRewriter
    Unit tests for the common datatype rewriter class.
    TestDatatypes
     
    TestDatatypeTranslation
    Class checking special cases of datatypes translation.
    TestDatatypeTranslation.DatatypeTranslationErrors
     
    TestDatatypeTranslator
    Unit tests to check both datatype translated expressions and axioms created by the datatype translator.
    TestEnumDatatypeTranslator
    Tests for the enumeration datatype translation.
    These tests check that the enumeration datatype constructors are translated into fresh free identifiers of a new type which corresponds to the datatype constructor, and that the partition predicate associated to the translation is valid.
    TestSetInstantiation
    Unit tests of interface ISetInstantiation.
    TestTypeInstantiation
    Unit tests of interface ITypeInstantiation.
